message:
test(gui): expand quad rendering unit tests with vertex and color assertions

Replace single size() test with proper mod tests block containing
configured_quad() helper, assert_vertices_match() utility, and tests
for position/texture coordinate layout and color/HSV/flag propagation
across all quad vertices.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
